Package microui.core.controller

Class MultiLineTextController

java.lang.Object
microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
public final class MultiLineTextController extends Object
Controller for managing multi-line text with line-based operations and undo/redo functionality. Provides comprehensive text manipulation capabilities across multiple lines, including line insertion, removal, splitting, merging, and character-level editing.
See Also:
  • SingleLineTextController
  • Listener

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MultiLineTextController()
    Constructs a new multi-line text controller with one empty line.

    Checks if the entire text content is blank (contains only whitespace).

    Merges a line with the line below it.

    Performs a redo operation, reapplying the next text state.

    Removes a character at a specific position in a line.

    Removes a line at the specified index.

    Removes a substring from a line.

    Sets the input filter used for character validation on all lines.

    Sets the text content from an array of lines.

    Splits a line at the specified column position.

    Performs an undo operation, reverting to the previous text state.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • MultiLineTextController

      public MultiLineTextController()
      Constructs a new multi-line text controller with one empty line. The default input filter allows letters, digits, and common punctuation.

  • Method Details

    • getInputFilter

      public InputFilter getInputFilter()
      Returns the current input filter used for character validation.
      Returns:
      the input filter (never null)

    • setInputFilter

      public void setInputFilter(InputFilter inputFilter)
      Sets the input filter used for character validation on all lines.
      Parameters:
      inputFilter - the new input filter (must not be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if inputFilter is null

    • undo

      public void undo()
      Performs an undo operation, reverting to the previous text state.

    • redo

      public void redo()
      Performs a redo operation, reapplying the next text state.

    • getUndoStack

      public String getUndoStack()
      Returns a string representation of the undo stack for debugging.
      Returns:
      string representation of undo stack contents

    • getRedoStack

      public String getRedoStack()
      Returns a string representation of the redo stack for debugging.
      Returns:
      string representation of redo stack contents

    • isBlank

      public boolean isBlank()
      Checks if the entire text content is blank (contains only whitespace).
      Returns:
      true if there's only one line and it's empty, false otherwise

    • getLinesCount

      public int getLinesCount()
      Returns the number of lines in the text.
      Returns:
      the count of lines

    • addLine

      public void addLine(String text)
      Adds a new line with the specified text at the end.
      Parameters:
      text - the text for the new line (must not be null)

    • insertLine

      public void insertLine(int index, String text)
      Inserts a new line with the specified text at the given index.
      Parameters:
      index - the position to insert the new line
      text - the text for the new line (must not be null)

    • removeLine

      public void removeLine(int index)
      Removes a line at the specified index. If only one line remains, clears its content instead of removing.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the line to remove

    • insertCharForLine

      public void insertCharForLine(int row, int column, char ch)
      Inserts a character at a specific position in a line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index
      column - the character position within the line (will be constrained to a valid range)
      ch - the character to insert

    • insertStringForLine

      public void insertStringForLine(int row, int column, String str)
      Inserts a string at a specific position in a line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index
      column - the character position within the line (will be constrained to a valid range)
      str - the string to insert (filtered according to the input filter)

    • removeCharForLine

      public void removeCharForLine(int row, int column)
      Removes a character at a specific position in a line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index
      column - the character position within the line (will be constrained to a valid range)

    • removeStringForLine

      public void removeStringForLine(int row, int columnStart, int columnEnd)
      Removes a substring from a line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index
      columnStart - the starting position (inclusive, will be constrained)
      columnEnd - the ending position (exclusive, will be constrained)

    • splitLine

      public void splitLine(int row, int column)
      Splits a line at the specified column position. Text from the column position to the end of the line becomes a new line below.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index to split
      column - the column position to split at (will be constrained to the line length)

    • mergeLines

      public void mergeLines(int row)
      Merges a line with the line below it.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index to merge with the next line

    • getLine

      public SingleLineTextController getLine(int row)
      Returns the text controller for a specific line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index
      Returns:
      the SingleLineTextController for the specified line

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Returns the complete text content as a single string with newline separators.
      Returns:
      the complete text content

    • setText

      public void setText(String... lines)
      Sets the text content from an array of lines.
      Parameters:
      lines - the array of line strings to set (each element must not be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the array itself or any element is null

    • setRawText

      public void setRawText(String text)
      Sets the text content from a raw string with newline separators.
      Parameters:
      text - the raw text string (newlines will be used to split into lines; must not be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if text is null

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all text content while maintaining at least one empty line.

    • getLineText

      public String getLineText(int row)
      Returns the text content of a specific line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index
      Returns:
      the text content of the specified line

    • getLineLength

      public int getLineLength(int row)
      Returns the length (character count) of a specific line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index
      Returns:
      the number of characters in the specified line

    • setOnTextChangedListener

      public void setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
      Sets the listener for text change events.
      Parameters:
      onTextChangedListener - the listener to call when text changes (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if listener is null

    • getSpeedForUpdate

      public int getSpeedForUpdate()
      Returns the current update speed (minimum milliseconds between history updates).
      Returns:
      the update speed in milliseconds

    • setSpeedForUpdate

      public void setSpeedForUpdate(int speedForUpdate)
      Sets the update speed for history tracking.
      Parameters:
      speedForUpdate - the minimum milliseconds between history updates (must be в‰Ґ 0)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if speedForUpdate is less than 0
